root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes a deterministic executor panic (index lookup join with prefix index) and adds a reproducer test. The `c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test")` seen in the patch is unrelated and does not diagnose a flaky root cause; CI logs/repro are needed to determine whether this was truly flaky or just a correctness bug.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
